description: Single point of failure for AI/ML tasks (SOW Processing)
mitigation_strategy: Backend Lead to pair-program on integration points; Document prompt engineering strategy extensively
contingency_plan: Contract external AI specialist for review if extraction quality is low
monitoring_trigger: SOW extraction accuracy < 80% during dev testing

description: Backend Lead bottleneck in Sprint 3 due to Payout Saga complexity
